name: @ministryofmany/identity
description: Pure Semaphore v4 identity layer: deterministic per-app-secret -> per-context Identity derivation (one Ministry-delivered branch yields an unlinkable distinct commitment per context), a zero-dependency ./link entry for the OIDC-fragment anon handoff (capture + scrub + epoch-driven adopt/rekey decision), the per-device commitment lifecycle + revocation contract, and the structural SemaphoreIdentityLike shape the membership layer consumes. No Semaphore v3 or RLN in its dependency tree.
author: AtHeartEngineer
